item.title: How To Install NiFi Registry on Kubernetes with CFM Operator
item.description: A quick how to guide for installing NiFi Registry on minikube with the CFM Operator

item.title: How To Install Cloudera Iceberg MCP Server
item.description: How to build and locally test the Cloudera Iceberg MCP Server with MCP Inspector using Cloudera Apache Iceberg deployed on AWS in a Cloudera Data Warehouse.

item.title: How To Install Cloudera NiFi MCP Server
item.description: How to build and locally test the Cloudera NiFi MCP Server with MCP Inspector using Cloudera Apache NiFi deployed on AWS in a Data.

item.title: Real-Time Monitoring with Observability
item.description: CDP Real time Monitoring for 7.1.9+ and 7.2.18+ with Cloudera Observability SaaS is now GA We are announcing the general availability of Real-Time Monitoring (RTM) capabilities for Cloudera Data Platform (CDP) customers through our Observability SaaS offering.

item.title: How to AI with NiFi and Python
item.description: How to Build and Test Custom NiFi Python Processors with AI (Without Breaking NiFi)

item.title: Observability with Cloudera Streaming Operators
item.description: The complete guide to building an end-to-end observability pipeline for NiFi, Kafka, and Flink on Kubernetes using the Cloudera Streaming Operators, Prometheus, and Grafana.

item.title: Announcing Cloudera Streaming Analytics 1.17.0
item.description: We are excited to announce the release of Cloudera Streaming Analytics 1.17.0 for on-premises deployments. This update reinforces our commitment to a stable, secure, and high-performance streaming offering. By aligning with Cloudera 7.3.2.0 and modernizing our User-Defined Function (UDF) framework, we’re providing a more robust foundation for Apache Flink and Cloudera SQL Stream Builder.

item.title: Monitoring Cloudera Streams Messaging (CSM) with Prometheus
item.description: Unlock deep Kafka broker metrics in Cloudera Streams Messaging (CSM) by injecting a custom JMX Prometheus Exporter and deploying a targeted PodMonitor.

item.title: Monitoring Cloudera Flow Management (CFM) with Prometheus
item.description: Discover how to securely expose Cloudera Flow Management (CFM) NiFi metrics to Prometheus by configuring an mTLS bypass for Single User Auth.

item.title: Monitoring Cloudera Streaming Analytics (CSA) with Prometheus
item.description: Learn how to monitor dynamic Flink and SQL Stream Builder jobs in Cloudera Streaming Analytics (CSA) by utilizing a Headless Service and ServiceMonitor for Prometheus discovery.
